prompt:
A hydroponic nutrient reservoir test moment captured on a clean bench: a pH test strip held with tweezers above a small sample cup, showing a distinct color change on the strip pads. Next to it sits a simple note card with abstract, unreadable scribbles and a capped dropper pipette, clearly communicating “latest reading recorded with sample notes” without relying on readable text.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image in a grounded near-future solarpunk lab aesthetic: soft, diffused lighting, clean plastics and glass, no logos, no readable labels, and no on-image text. Keep the strip and sample cup centered and unmistakable for icon clarity.
